---
title: "Charlotte Mary Yonge - Bye-words : a collection of tales, new and old"
year: 1880
slug: "bye_words"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


[Click here to download*Byewords*in a variety of file formats](http://ia350627.us.archive.org/2/items/byewordsacollec01yonggoog/)

#### Contents

The boy bishop  
(published in[The Monthly Packet](monthly_packet.qmd), Christmas 1878)

One will and three ways  
(published in[The Monthly Packet](monthly_packet.qmd), Christmas 1877)

Kaspar's summer dream  
(published in[The Monthly Packet](monthly_packet.qmd), Christmas 1876)

Buy a broom

The travels of two kits

Selma's secret sighs

Our ghost at Fantford

Anna's wedding cake

Autobiography of Patty Applecheeks

A holiday engagement, or, The Campbells are coming.
